creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
(In reply to my own from comment #5)

actually may be better to check, rather than assign, QT5_VERSION since the ports make environment doesn't seem to do the version checks.  it does use a '?=' to assign it to the current version, which I would think implies that you can assign it to something else.  But since it's not obvious (to me anyway) where this is being checked, if at all, it's probably better to check for it and compare the version to whatever you know actually builds, and warn (or fail or apply additional patches) for anything else.
